https://www.goal.com/en-gb/news/oh-why-18-months-tuchel-admits-to-concerns-over-short-term/e7xxyn9hp4nj1lh8kc7i8of98

'Oh, why 18 months?' - Tuchel admits to concerns over short-term Chelsea contract

“I want to be very honest with you, at first it was a concern, I was a little like 'oh, why 18 months?'” Tuchel told reporters. “And after one minute I thought 'what does it change?'

“What does it change? If they give me four-and-a-half years, they [could] sack me anyway. If they are not happy with me, they will sack me anyway. And if they gave me four-and-a-half years they would put in a clause that when they sack me, they'll pay me.

“So where can I be sure that I'll be there for four-and-a-half years? You cannot. That is the truth at this level. What is the role right now of the coaches? Are we in charge of the whole team and the transfers as well, or not, are we totally free in everything we do or not?

“Are we only responsible for bad results or also good results? What is this role and where do we find ourselves in that? So I decided not to worry too much, be brave enough to take on this adventure, because it was absolutely clear that I want to do it and I don't want to miss the chance.

“It's also my character to believe more in the chances than the risks. There is absolutely, for me personally, nothing to be afraid of. I'm very grateful to do this job at this level and I don't want to waste my time thinking about risks.”

https://www.goal.com/en-gb/news/oh-why-18-months-tuchel-admits-to-concerns-over-short-term/e7xxyn9hp4nj1lh8kc7i8of98

'Oh, why 18 months?' - Tuchel admits to concerns over short-term Chelsea contract

“I want to be very honest with you, at first it was a concern, I was a little like 'oh, why 18 months?'” Tuchel told reporters. “And after one minute I thought 'what does it change?'

“What does it change? If they give me four-and-a-half years, they [could] sack me anyway. If they are not happy with me, they will sack me anyway. And if they gave me four-and-a-half years they would put in a clause that when they sack me, they'll pay me.

“So where can I be sure that I'll be there for four-and-a-half years? You cannot. That is the truth at this level. What is the role right now of the coaches? Are we in charge of the whole team and the transfers as well, or not, are we totally free in everything we do or not?

“Are we only responsible for bad results or also good results? What is this role and where do we find ourselves in that? So I decided not to worry too much, be brave enough to take on this adventure, because it was absolutely clear that I want to do it and I don't want to miss the chance.

“It's also my character to believe more in the chances than the risks. There is absolutely, for me personally, nothing to be afraid of. I'm very grateful to do this job at this level and I don't want to waste my time thinking about risks.”

We have to improve in the last 20 metres and position-wise and timing-wise, with runs, with dribbling and in taking maybe even more risks in certain zones and speeding up the game when we already have the advantage. This is the challenge, so we're in the middle of it.

‘I will not lose any minutes in worrying about the style of the opponent. It was also our fault that Wolves played so deep because we played high up the pitch with a lot of possession. So it is also action and reaction and our quality pushed Wolves very deep in the in the game and it was very hard to find a solution.

‘It's my job to adapt to this and we expect Burnley to be a very solid squad, a very structured 4-4-2 normally, a very defensive and disciplined block, and this is fair enough. This is how they play, this is how they play in the first division and this is how they get their results. It’s on us and it’s a big challenge again.’

Tuchel賽後訪問摘要：
-球員保持耐性，控制局面，創造唔少機會，勇於壓前，各方面都做得好好
-3位中堅以及兩位中場表現出色
-起用Alonso因為希望多一個高大球員去防守死球，Alonso亦好熟悉左翼衛呢個位置，並非因為唔滿意Chilwell既表現
-排陣非常困難，希望儘量比機會每一位球員
-除非搵到可以連勝20場既11人陣容，否則都會繼續輪換
-醫療團隊分析過Ziyech出現疲態，今場唔可以踢多過30分鐘，所以唔放佢入名單
-Odoi有跑動能力有速度，適合踢右翼衛
-（談論Werner) 前鋒失機好正常，最重要係夠勤力，同時球隊未能發揮到Werner既長處，有幾下反擊都交唔到比Werner
